name: meeting-mcp
tagline: A READ-only surface over your #capture/meeting notes — exposes them as an end-user-friendly MCP tool set + REST, surfacing domain vocabulary (recent meetings, search, one meeting) rather than raw vault notes.

tags.name: capture/meeting
tags.description: Meeting captures — one note per meeting. This surface READS them and projects a curated, end-user-facing shape (id, title, date, summary/snippet/attendees/body) over MCP + REST; it never returns the raw note. Written upstream by an ingest surface (e.g. meeting-ingest) or by hand.
